title: Uniper Partners with AM Green to Deliver 500,000 Tons of Green Ammonia Annually
content: Uniper and AM Green Ammonia India have signed a long-term binding offtake agreement for up to 500,000 tons per year of renewable ammonia, certified as Renewable Fuel of Non-Biological Origin (RFNBO). The deal, announced in Ahmedabad in the presence of German Chancellor Friedrich Merz and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi, marks one of the first large-scale supply corridors between India and Europe. The first shipment is expected in 2028 from AM Greenâ€™s 1 MTPA plant in Kakinada. This milestone supports Indiaâ€™s National Hydrogen Mission and Uniperâ€™s strategy to decarbonize European industries through renewable and low-carbon molecules.
author: Analysts Account
